info.description: REST & WebSocket API specification for Prism, a self-hosted media server.
info.title: Prism Media Server API

get.description: Retrieve current health, unmatched, and ambiguous counts of indexed transcode artifacts across all storage areas.

200.description: Returns active artifact statuses, counts, and health statistics

post.description: Scan all enabled segment storage areas for artifact artifact.json sidecar files to index them in the database.
Regenerate all MPEG-DASH manifest (.mpd) files on the server using database records and artifact sidecars.
Perform deterministic fingerprint-based matching to link indexed transcode artifacts with existing media items in the database.

200.description: Returns link execution counts (linked, unmatched, ambiguous, invalid, skipped)

post.description: Iterate through all transcode-completed media items and generate artifact.json recovery sidecars on disk.

200.description: Returns write execution counts (written, skipped, errors)

post.description: Validates user credentials, sets refresh token cookie, and returns a JWT access token.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing fields

post.description: Revokes the active refresh token and clears the refresh token cookie.
Issues a new JWT access token using the refresh token cookie.

get.description: Browse immediate subdirectories matching a partial path for autocomplete in the setup/admin panel.

200.description: Returns list of matched absolute directory paths: {'dirs': [...]}

get.description: Retrieve a list of watch history records (in-progress items) for the current user.

put.description: Record active playback seconds and completion status for a media item.

get.description: Returns the most recently updated in-progress item for the current user, bundled with media metadata.
Retrieve a list of all active/historical transcoding jobs.

post.description: Creates a new transcode job for a specific media item, or bulk enqueues based on a filter.

200.description: Returns number of jobs enqueued (for bulk filter): {'enqueued': N}

202.description: Returns the created transcode job (for single item)

get.description: Retrieve a single transcode job by ID.

post.description: Move a pending job to the front of the transcoding queue.

409.description: Job is not pending (already processing or finished)

patch.description: Update progress (0-100) or report failures of the currently assigned transcode sub-job.

400.description: Invalid request body or sub-job ID

403.description: Sub-job not assigned to this worker

put.description: Upload completed stream/segments output files as a ZIP bundle for a sub-job. The server extracts the bundle, merges segments, regenerates the master manifest, and updates statuses.
put.summary: Upload Transcode Output Bundle for Sub-Job

parameters.description: The ZIP bundle file containing transcode outputs (segments, etc.)
parameters.name: bundle

400.description: Invalid sub-job ID or multipart form

403.description: Sub-job not assigned to this worker

get.description: Retrieve a list of all libraries (movie, tvshow, etc.) indexed by the server.

post.description: Add a new media library pointing to a directory path.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing fields

post.description: Triggers a directory scan to index new/updated files.

get.description: Download the original raw media source file for transcoding.

post.description: Clear metadata across all media items, TV shows, and TV seasons, and re-trigger bulk background TMDB metadata enrichment.

202.description: Returns status and count of cleared records

get.description: Lists media items (movies, episodes) with filtering/sorting capabilities.
Returns the size of each resolution subdirectory and the total size in the media item's transcode bundle.
Retrieve a dictionary of all editable server setting keys and values.

put.description: Update one or more server setting values. Unknown keys return a bad request status.

400.description: Invalid request body or unknown configuration key

post.description: Configure the server for the first time by setting up the admin account, TMDB API, Chromecast App ID, and storage paths.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing required parameters

get.description: Retrieve a list of all configured storage areas with path metrics (total, free, used bytes and utilization percentage).

post.description: Register a new storage area for segments.

put.description: Update global storage settings, such as minimum free bytes required on disk.
Update path or enabled status of an existing storage area.

delete.description: Remove a storage area from the database. Note that files on disk are not deleted.

post.description: Generates a short-lived token to authenticate Chromecast playback URLs.

get.description: Retrieve the DASH master manifest file (.mpd) for a media item. Consumable by video players.

404.description: Media item not found or transcode pending

get.description: Retrieve a specific video/audio media segment file (.m4s, .mp4, subtitles) for adaptive streaming.
Retrieve a list of all defined transcode profiles.

post.description: Create a new transcode profile.

400.description: Invalid request body or path mismatch

get.description: Retrieve a list of all indexed TV shows with optional filtering and sorting.
Retrieve all seasons belonging to a specific TV show.
Retrieve all episodes (returned as MediaItems) for a specific season of a show.

post.description: Create a new user account. If no users exist, this request is open and makes the user an Admin. Otherwise, it requires Admin JWT.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing fields

409.description: Username or email already in use

get.description: Returns profile details for the currently logged-in user.

put.description: Allows the authenticated user to update their profile details (username, email, password).

409.description: Username or email already in use

get.description: Retrieve a list of all active ephemeral worker registration tokens.

post.description: Create a new re-usable registration token for ephemeral workers.

delete.description: Revoke/delete an ephemeral worker registration token.

post.description: Submit worker status heartbeat. If the worker has capacity, claims and returns the next pending transcode sub-job.
Register an ephemeral remote transcode worker using a registration token.

400.description: Invalid request or token name missing

get.description: Retrieve a list of all registered remote transcode workers.

post.description: Register a new remote transcode worker. Returns the created worker metadata including its authentication secret key.

put.description: Update concurrency limits (threads) or hardware acceleration configuration for a registered worker.

delete.description: De-register a remote transcode worker and invalidate its API credentials.

job.description: keep JSON key as "job" for worker compatibility

tv_show_id.description: TV episode fields (nullable; populated only for MediaTypeEpisode items)

size.description: Total size of all files in the rendition directory in bytes

WorkerAuth.description: The secret API Key assigned to the transcode worker.
WorkerAuth.name: X-Worker-API-Key
